name: Mob Gladiator
teaser: Arena survival against waves of enemies, built as a focused combat project.
mainDescription: A wave-based arena combat project focused on readable action, enemy pressure, and practical progression systems.
secondaryDescription: Mob Gladiator is about holding your ground in a dangerous arena while enemy waves keep pushing closer. The focus is tight combat, clear enemy pressure, and upgrades that help each run feel stronger without losing the simple survival core.
